name: zombie_rider.live_wounded_disengagement_mcw
description: Live wounded-rider row: one damaged hostile rider at bow range records disengagement/withdrawal instead of unfair final-shot spam.

steps.label: post_load_wounded_rider_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: staged wounded zombie-rider fixture loads to live map

steps.label: audit_saved_noon_before_wounded_rider
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not prove expected noon turn before live wounded-rider window
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved turn proves local noon before wounded rider pressure window

steps.label: audit_saved_wounded_zombie_rider_before_window
steps.abort_reason: saved active_monsters metadata did not contain required wounded rider footing
steps.expected_visible_fact: one hostile wounded zombie rider starts eight tiles north at bow-pressure range

steps.label: toggle_safe_mode_off_before_wounded_rider
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode is toggled off so the bounded live wounded-rider window is not consumed by warnings

steps.label: advance_wounded_rider_disengagement_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: bounded live turn window records wounded rider withdrawal/disengagement instead of bow-pressure greed

steps.label: audit_zombie_rider_wounded_live_plan
steps.abort_reason: same-run artifact lacked wounded rider withdrawal live-plan lines
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact proves live wounded rider planning withdraws/disengages

evidence_contract.claim: a staged live wounded zombie rider at visible bow range uses the monster::plan seam to withdraw/disengage instead of taking greedy final shots
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for zombie-rider wounded disengagement behavior
evidence_contract.writeback_note: No save/writeback gate: this scenario proves bounded live-plan behavior from current-run logs plus saved start-state footing; persistent map mutation is not part of the product claim.
